---
title: "data_clean_seasonal"
author: "Wenkai_Zhong"
date: "2025-08-25"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(here)
```

#make analysis table include forecast, official observation and WOW data
#function
```{r}
# Custom progress display function
show_progress <- function(current, total, start_time = NULL, message = "") {
  # Calculate percentage
  pct <- round(current / total * 100, 1)
  
  # Create progress bar
  bar_width <- 40
  filled <- round(bar_width * current / total)
  bar <- paste0(
    "|",
    paste(rep("=", filled), collapse = ""),
    paste(rep(" ", bar_width - filled), collapse = ""),
    "|"
  )
  
  # Calculate ETA if start_time provided
  eta_msg <- ""
  if (!is.null(start_time)) {
    elapsed <- as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), start_time, units = "secs"))
    if (current > 0) {
      eta_secs <- (elapsed / current) * (total - current)
      if (eta_secs < 60) {
        eta_msg <- sprintf(" ETA: %ds", round(eta_secs))
      } else {
        eta_msg <- sprintf(" ETA: %.1fm", eta_secs / 60)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Display
  cat(sprintf("\r%s [%d/%d] %.1f%%%s %s          ", 
            bar, current, total, pct, eta_msg, message))
  
  if (current == total) cat("\n")
}

# Modified collection function with multiple leadtime support
collect_data_range_optimized <- function(start_date, end_date, gridpoint_id, 
                                         leadtime = NULL,  # Can be NULL, single value, or vector
                                         n_wow_stations = 5,
                                         parallel = FALSE,
                                         n_cores = NULL) {
  
  # Setup
  start_date_obj <- as.Date(start_date)
  end_date_obj <- as.Date(end_date)
  init_start_date <- start_date_obj - 10
  init_end_date <- end_date_obj
  
  # Handle leadtime parameter
  if (is.null(leadtime)) {
    leadtime <- seq(0, 240, by = 6)  # Default: all standard lead times
    cat("Using all standard lead times (0-240 hours, every 6 hours)\n")
  } else if (length(leadtime) == 1) {
    cat(sprintf("Using single lead time: %d hours\n", leadtime))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("Using %d lead times: %s hours\n", 
                length(leadtime), paste(sort(leadtime), collapse = ", ")))
  }
  
  unique_init_dates <- seq(init_start_date, init_end_date, by = "day")
  total_inits <- length(unique_init_dates) * 2
  
  cat(sprintf("\nCollecting data from %s to %s\n", start_date, end_date))
  cat(sprintf("Initialization period: %s to %s\n", init_start_date, init_end_date))
  cat(sprintf("Total initialization times: %d (00:00 and 12:00 UTC)\n", total_inits))
  cat(sprintf("Grid point ID: %d\n", gridpoint_id))
  cat(sprintf("WOW stations: %d\n\n", n_wow_stations))
  
  # Initialize
  data_list <- vector("list", total_inits)
  list_index <- 1
  progress <- 0
  failed_count <- 0
  start_time <- Sys.time()
  
  # Optional parallel processing setup
  if (parallel) {
    if (!requireNamespace("parallel", quietly = TRUE)) {
      cat("Warning: 'parallel' package not available. Using sequential processing.\n")
      parallel <- FALSE
    } else {
      if (is.null(n_cores)) {
        n_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 1
      }
      cat(sprintf("Using parallel processing with %d cores\n\n", n_cores))
    }
  }
  
  if (parallel) {
    # Parallel processing
    cl <- parallel::makeCluster(n_cores)
    on.exit(parallel::stopCluster(cl))
    
    # Export necessary functions and libraries to workers
    parallel::clusterExport(cl, c("combine_forecast_obs_wow", 
                                   "combine_forecast_obs",
                                   "import_WOW_nearest_stations",
                                   "get_wbgt"), 
                            envir = .GlobalEnv)
    
    parallel::clusterEvalQ(cl, {
      library(dplyr)
      library(tidyr)
      library(lubridate)
    })
    
    # Create parameter combinations
    params <- expand.grid(
      init_date = as.character(unique_init_dates),
      hour = c("00:00:00", "12:00:00"),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    # Process in parallel
    cat("Processing forecasts in parallel...\n")
    
    results <- parallel::parLapply(cl, 1:nrow(params), function(i) {
      init_time <- paste(params$init_date[i], params$hour[i])
      
      tryCatch({
        suppressWarnings(suppressMessages({
          temp_data <- combine_forecast_obs_wow(
            init_time, 
            gridpoint_id,
            leadtime,
            n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations,
            include_metadata = FALSE
          )
        }))
        
        return(temp_data)
        
      }, error = function(e) {
        return(NULL)
      })
    })
    
    # Filter out NULL results and count failures
    data_list <- results[!sapply(results, is.null)]
    failed_count <- sum(sapply(results, is.null))
    
  } else {
    # Sequential processing with progress bar
    for (init_date in as.character(unique_init_dates)) {
      for (hour in c("00:00:00", "12:00:00")) {
        init_time <- paste(init_date, hour)
        progress <- progress + 1
        
        # Show detailed progress
        show_progress(progress, total_inits, start_time, 
                     message = sprintf("Init: %s", init_time))
        
        # Collect data with leadtime parameter
        tryCatch({
          suppressWarnings(suppressMessages({
            temp_data <- combine_forecast_obs_wow(
              init_time, 
              gridpoint_id,
              leadtime,  # Can be single value, vector, or NULL
              n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations,
              include_metadata = FALSE
            )
          }))
          
          if (!is.null(temp_data) && nrow(temp_data) > 0) {
            data_list[[list_index]] <- temp_data
            list_index <- list_index + 1
          } else {
            failed_count <- failed_count + 1
          }
          
          # Clean up
          rm(temp_data)
          
        }, error = function(e) {
          failed_count <- failed_count + 1
        })
        
        # Aggressive temp file cleanup - clean after EVERY iteration
        if (progress %% 10 == 0) {  # Clean every 10 iterations
          suppressWarnings({
            files <- list.files(tempdir(), full.names = TRUE)
            if (length(files) > 0) {
              file.remove(files[!file.info(files)$isdir])
            }
            gc(verbose = FALSE, full = TRUE)
          })
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Remove NULL entries for sequential processing
    data_list <- data_list[1:(list_index-1)]
  }
  
  # Summary
  total_time <- difftime(Sys.time(), start_time, units = "mins")
  cat(sprintf("\n\nCollection complete in %.1f minutes\n", total_time))
  cat(sprintf("Success: %d | Failed: %d\n", 
              length(data_list), failed_count))
  
  if (length(data_list) == 0) {
    cat("No data collected\n")
    return(data.frame())
  }
  
  # Combine data
  cat("\nCombining data...")
  
  # Get all unique columns across all data frames
  all_cols <- unique(unlist(lapply(data_list, names)))
  
  # Process in chunks to avoid memory issues
  chunk_size <- 50
  n_chunks <- ceiling(length(data_list) / chunk_size)
  
  combined_chunks <- list()
  
  for (i in 1:n_chunks) {
    start_idx <- (i - 1) * chunk_size + 1
    end_idx <- min(i * chunk_size, length(data_list))
    
    # Standardize columns for this chunk
    chunk_data <- lapply(data_list[start_idx:end_idx], function(df) {
      if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)
      missing_cols <- setdiff(all_cols, names(df))
      if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
        for (col in missing_cols) df[[col]] <- NA
      }
      df[, all_cols]
    })
    
    # Combine this chunk
    chunk_combined <- do.call(rbind, chunk_data[!sapply(chunk_data, is.null)])
    combined_chunks[[i]] <- chunk_combined
    
    # Show progress
    cat(sprintf("\rCombining data... %d%%", round(i/n_chunks * 100)))
  }
  
  # Final combination
  all_data <- do.call(rbind, combined_chunks)
  
  # Clear memory
  rm(data_list, combined_chunks)
  gc(verbose = FALSE, full = TRUE)
  
  cat(" Done!\n")
  
  # Filter for valid period
  start_datetime <- as.POSIXct(paste(start_date, "00:00:00"), tz = "UTC")
  end_datetime <- as.POSIXct(paste(end_date, "23:59:59"), tz = "UTC")
  
  if ("Valid_datetime" %in% names(all_data)) {
    cat("Filtering for valid period...")
    filtered_data <- all_data[all_data$Valid_datetime >= start_datetime & 
                              all_data$Valid_datetime <= end_datetime, ]
    cat(" Done!\n")
  } else {
    filtered_data <- all_data
  }
  
  # Remove duplicates if any (can happen with multiple lead times)
  if ("Valid_datetime" %in% names(filtered_data) && "lead_time" %in% names(filtered_data)) {
    cat("Removing duplicates...")
    filtered_data <- filtered_data %>%
      distinct()
    cat(" Done!\n")
  }
  
  # Summary statistics
  cat("\n=== Final Dataset Summary ===\n")
  cat(sprintf("Dimensions: %d rows × %d columns\n", nrow(filtered_data), ncol(filtered_data)))
  
  if ("lead_time" %in% names(filtered_data)) {
    lead_times_found <- sort(unique(filtered_data$lead_time))
    cat(sprintf("Lead times in data: %s\n", 
                paste(head(lead_times_found, 10), collapse = ", ")))
    if (length(lead_times_found) > 10) {
      cat(sprintf("  ... and %d more\n", length(lead_times_found) - 10))
    }
  }
  
  if ("Valid_datetime" %in% names(filtered_data)) {
    date_range <- range(filtered_data$Valid_datetime)
    cat(sprintf("Date range: %s to %s\n", 
                format(date_range[1], "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"),
                format(date_range[2], "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")))
  }
  
  if ("wow_data_available" %in% names(filtered_data)) {
    wow_coverage <- mean(filtered_data$wow_data_available, na.rm = TRUE)
    cat(sprintf("WOW data coverage: %.1f%%\n", wow_coverage * 100))
  }
  
  # Final cleanup
  suppressWarnings({
    files <- list.files(tempdir(), full.names = TRUE)
    if (length(files) > 0) {
      file.remove(files[!file.info(files)$isdir])
    }
    gc(verbose = FALSE, full = TRUE)
  })
  
  # Add metadata as attributes
  attr(filtered_data, "leadtime") <- leadtime
  attr(filtered_data, "collection_time") <- total_time
  attr(filtered_data, "date_range") <- c(start_date, end_date)
  
  return(filtered_data)
}

# Example usage:

# 1. Single lead time (original behavior)
# data1 <- collect_data_range_optimized(
#   start_date = "2021-07-01",
#   end_date = "2021-07-07",
#   gridpoint_id = 891,
#   leadtime = 24,
#   n_wow_stations = 5
# )

# 2. Multiple specific lead times
# data2 <- collect_data_range_optimized(
#   start_date = "2021-07-01",
#   end_date = "2021-07-01",
#   gridpoint_id = 891,
#   leadtime = c(6, 12),
#   n_wow_stations = 5
# )


# 3. All standard lead times (NULL)
# data3 <- collect_data_range_optimized(
#   start_date = "2021-07-01",
#   end_date = "2021-07-07",
#   gridpoint_id = 891,
#   leadtime = NULL,  # Will use 0, 6, 12, ..., 240
#   n_wow_stations = 5
# )

# 4. With parallel processing (for large datasets)
# data4 <- collect_data_range_optimized(
#   start_date = "2021-07-01",
#   end_date = "2021-07-31",
#   gridpoint_id = 891,
#   leadtime = c(24, 48, 72),
#   n_wow_stations = 5,
#   parallel = TRUE,
#   n_cores = 4
# )


```

#clean data create and save those to RDS
```{r}
# # Set parameters for 12-hour and 24 h forecast
# gridpoint_id <- 891
# n_wow_stations <- 5
# leadtime_hours <- c(6, 24, 48)
# 
# get_filename <- function(season, year, gridpoint, leadtimes) {
#   # Create leadtime string: "L6_24_48" for multiple or "L6" for single
#   lt_str <- paste0("L", paste(leadtimes, collapse = "_"))
#   
#   # Format: season_year_Gxxxx_Lxx.rds
#   filename <- sprintf("%s_%d_G%d_%s.rds", 
#                      tolower(season), year, gridpoint, lt_str)
#   return(filename)
# }
# 
# # ============================================
# #              2021 DATA COLLECTION
# # ============================================
# 
# cat("=====================================\n")
# cat("Starting 2021 Data Collection\n")
# cat("Lead times:", paste(leadtime_hours, "hours\n"))
# cat("=====================================\n\n")
# 
# # Spring 2021 (March 1 - May 31) ✓ COMPLETED
# spring_2021_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
#   start_date = "2021-03-01",
#   end_date = "2021-05-31",
#   gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
#   leadtime = leadtime_hours,
#   n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
# )
# filename <- get_filename("spring", 2021, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
# saveRDS(spring_2021_data, here("data_clean", filename))
# cat("✓ Spring 2021 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(spring_2021_data), "\n\n")
# 
# # Summer 2021 (June 1 - August 31) 
# # ⚠️ WARNING: Missing data from 2021-07-29 04:00 to 2021-08-26 10:00
# summer_2021_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
#   start_date = "2021-06-01",
#   end_date = "2021-08-31",
#   gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
#   leadtime = leadtime_hours,
#   n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
# )
# filename <- get_filename("summer", 2021, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
# saveRDS(summer_2021_data, here("data_clean", filename))
# cat("✓ Summer 2021 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(summer_2021_data), "\n")
# cat("  ⚠️ Note: Missing data period 07-29 to 08-26\n\n")
# 
# # Autumn 2021 (September 1 - November 30)
# # ⚠️ WARNING: Missing data from 2021-10-18 11:00 to 2021-10-20 20:00
# autumn_2021_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
#   start_date = "2021-09-01",
#   end_date = "2021-11-30",
#   gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
#   leadtime = leadtime_hours,
#   n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
# )
# filename <- get_filename("autumn", 2021, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
# saveRDS(autumn_2021_data, here("data_clean", filename))
# cat("✓ Autumn 2021 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(autumn_2021_data), "\n")
# cat("  ⚠️ Note: Missing data period 10-18 to 10-20\n\n")
# 
# # Winter 2021-2022 (December 1, 2021 - February 28, 2022) ✓ COMPLETED
# winter_2021_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
#   start_date = "2021-12-01",
#   end_date = "2022-02-28",
#   gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
#   leadtime = leadtime_hours,
#   n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
# )
# filename <- get_filename("winter", 2021, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
# saveRDS(winter_2021_data, here("data_clean", filename))
# cat("✓ Winter 2021-22 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(winter_2021_data), "\n\n")
# 
# # ============================================
# #              2022 DATA COLLECTION
# # ============================================
# 
# cat("=====================================\n")
# cat("Starting 2022 Data Collection\n")
# cat("=====================================\n\n")
# 
# # Spring 2022 (March 1 - May 31)
# # spring_2022_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
# #   start_date = "2022-03-01",
# #   end_date = "2022-05-31",
# #   gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
# #   leadtime = leadtime_hours,
# #   n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
# # )
# # filename <- get_filename("spring", 2022, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
# # saveRDS(spring_2022_data, here("data_clean", filename))
# # cat("✓ Spring 2022 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(spring_2022_data), "\n\n")
# 
# # Summer 2022 (June 1 - August 31)
# # summer_2022_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
# #   start_date = "2022-06-01",
# #   end_date = "2022-08-31",
# #   gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
# #   leadtime = leadtime_hours,
# #   n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
# # )
# # filename <- get_filename("summer", 2022, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
# # saveRDS(summer_2022_data, here("data_clean", filename))
# # cat("✓ Summer 2022 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(summer_2022_data), "\n\n")
# 
# # Autumn 2022 (September 1 - November 30)
# # autumn_2022_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
# #   start_date = "2022-09-01",
# #   end_date = "2022-11-30",
# #   gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
# #   leadtime = leadtime_hours,
# #   n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
# # )
# # filename <- get_filename("autumn", 2022, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
# # saveRDS(autumn_2022_data, here("data_clean", filename))
# # cat("✓ Autumn 2022 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(autumn_2022_data), "\n\n")
# 
# # Winter 2022-2023 (December 1, 2022 - February 28, 2023)
# # winter_2022_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
# #   start_date = "2022-12-01",
# #   end_date = "2023-02-28",
# #   gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
# #   leadtime = leadtime_hours,
# #   n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
# # )
# # filename <- get_filename("winter", 2022, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
# # saveRDS(winter_2022_data, here("data_clean", filename))
# # cat("✓ Winter 2022-23 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(winter_2022_data), "\n\n")
# 
# # ============================================
# #              2023 DATA COLLECTION
# # ============================================
# 
# cat("=====================================\n")
# cat("Starting 2023 Data Collection\n")
# cat("=====================================\n\n")
# 
# # Spring 2023 (March 1 - May 31)
# # spring_2023_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
# #   start_date = "2023-03-01",
# #   end_date = "2023-05-31",
# #   gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
# #   leadtime = leadtime_hours,
# #   n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
# # )
# # filename <- get_filename("spring", 2023, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
# # saveRDS(spring_2023_data, here("data_clean", filename))
# # cat("✓ Spring 2023 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(spring_2023_data), "\n\n")
# 
# # Summer 2023 (June 1 - August 31)
# # summer_2023_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
# #   start_date = "2023-06-01",
# #   end_date = "2023-08-31",
# #   gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
# #   leadtime = leadtime_hours,
# #   n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
# # )
# # filename <- get_filename("summer", 2023, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
# # saveRDS(summer_2023_data, here("data_clean", filename))
# # cat("✓ Summer 2023 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(summer_2023_data), "\n\n")
# 
# # Autumn 2023 (September 1 - November 30)
# # autumn_2023_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
# #   start_date = "2023-09-01",
# #   end_date = "2023-11-30",
# #   gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
# #   leadtime = leadtime_hours,
# #   n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
# # )
# # filename <- get_filename("autumn", 2023, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
# # saveRDS(autumn_2023_data, here("data_clean", filename))
# # cat("✓ Autumn 2023 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(autumn_2023_data), "\n\n")
# 
# # Winter 2023-2024 (December 1, 2023 - February 29, 2024) 
# # Note: 2024 is a leap year
# winter_2023_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
#   start_date = "2023-12-01",
#   end_date = "2023-12-31",
#   gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
#   leadtime = leadtime_hours,
#   n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
# )
# filename <- get_filename("winter", 2023, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
# saveRDS(winter_2023_data, here("data_clean", filename))
# cat("✓ Winter 2023-24 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(winter_2023_data), "\n\n")

```


#Rotterdam
```{r}
# Set parameters for 12-hour and 24 h forecast
gridpoint_id <- 1002
n_wow_stations <- 5
leadtime_hours <- c(6, 24, 48)

get_filename <- function(season, year, gridpoint, leadtimes) {
  # Create leadtime string: "L6_24_48" for multiple or "L6" for single
  lt_str <- paste0("L", paste(leadtimes, collapse = "_"))
  
  # Format: season_year_Gxxxx_Lxx.rds
  filename <- sprintf("%s_%d_G%d_%s.rds", 
                     tolower(season), year, gridpoint, lt_str)
  return(filename)
}

# ============================================
#              2021 DATA COLLECTION
# ============================================

cat("=====================================\n")
cat("Starting 2021 Data Collection\n")
cat("Lead times:", paste(leadtime_hours, "hours\n"))
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# Spring 2021 (March 1 - May 31) 
spring_2021_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
  start_date = "2021-03-01",
  end_date = "2021-05-31",
  gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
  leadtime = leadtime_hours,
  n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
)
filename <- get_filename("spring", 2021, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
saveRDS(spring_2021_data, here("data_clean", filename))
cat("✓ Spring 2021 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(spring_2021_data), "\n\n")

# Summer 2021 (June 1 - August 31) 
# ⚠️ WARNING: Missing data from 2021-07-29 04:00 to 2021-08-26 10:00
summer_2021_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
  start_date = "2021-06-01",
  end_date = "2021-08-31",
  gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
  leadtime = leadtime_hours,
  n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
)
filename <- get_filename("summer", 2021, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
saveRDS(summer_2021_data, here("data_clean", filename))
cat("✓ Summer 2021 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(summer_2021_data), "\n")
cat("  ⚠️ Note: Missing data period 07-29 to 08-26\n\n")

# Autumn 2021 (September 1 - November 30)
# ⚠️ WARNING: Missing data from 2021-10-18 11:00 to 2021-10-20 20:00
autumn_2021_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
  start_date = "2021-09-01",
  end_date = "2021-11-30",
  gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
  leadtime = leadtime_hours,
  n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
)
filename <- get_filename("autumn", 2021, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
saveRDS(autumn_2021_data, here("data_clean", filename))
cat("✓ Autumn 2021 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(autumn_2021_data), "\n")
cat("  ⚠️ Note: Missing data period 10-18 to 10-20\n\n")

# Winter 2021-2022 (December 1, 2021 - February 28, 2022) ✓ COMPLETED
winter_2021_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
  start_date = "2021-12-01",
  end_date = "2022-02-28",
  gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
  leadtime = leadtime_hours,
  n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
)
filename <- get_filename("winter", 2021, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
saveRDS(winter_2021_data, here("data_clean", filename))
cat("✓ Winter 2021-22 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(winter_2021_data), "\n\n")

# ============================================
#              2022 DATA COLLECTION
# ============================================

cat("=====================================\n")
cat("Starting 2022 Data Collection\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# Spring 2022 (March 1 - May 31)
spring_2022_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
  start_date = "2022-03-01",
  end_date = "2022-05-31",
  gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
  leadtime = leadtime_hours,
  n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
)
filename <- get_filename("spring", 2022, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
saveRDS(spring_2022_data, here("data_clean", filename))
cat("✓ Spring 2022 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(spring_2022_data), "\n\n")

# Summer 2022 (June 1 - August 31)
summer_2022_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
  start_date = "2022-06-01",
  end_date = "2022-08-31",
  gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
  leadtime = leadtime_hours,
  n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
)
filename <- get_filename("summer", 2022, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
saveRDS(summer_2022_data, here("data_clean", filename))
cat("✓ Summer 2022 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(summer_2022_data), "\n\n")

# Autumn 2022 (September 1 - November 30)
autumn_2022_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
  start_date = "2022-09-01",
  end_date = "2022-11-30",
  gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
  leadtime = leadtime_hours,
  n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
)
filename <- get_filename("autumn", 2022, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
saveRDS(autumn_2022_data, here("data_clean", filename))
cat("✓ Autumn 2022 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(autumn_2022_data), "\n\n")

# Winter 2022-2023 (December 1, 2022 - February 28, 2023)
winter_2022_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
  start_date = "2022-12-01",
  end_date = "2023-02-28",
  gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
  leadtime = leadtime_hours,
  n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
)
filename <- get_filename("winter", 2022, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
saveRDS(winter_2022_data, here("data_clean", filename))
cat("✓ Winter 2022-23 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(winter_2022_data), "\n\n")

# ============================================
#              2023 DATA COLLECTION
# ============================================

cat("=====================================\n")
cat("Starting 2023 Data Collection\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# Spring 2023 (March 1 - May 31)
spring_2023_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
  start_date = "2023-03-01",
  end_date = "2023-05-31",
  gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
  leadtime = leadtime_hours,
  n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
)
filename <- get_filename("spring", 2023, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
saveRDS(spring_2023_data, here("data_clean", filename))
cat("✓ Spring 2023 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(spring_2023_data), "\n\n")

# Summer 2023 (June 1 - August 31)
summer_2023_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
  start_date = "2023-06-01",
  end_date = "2023-08-31",
  gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
  leadtime = leadtime_hours,
  n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
)
filename <- get_filename("summer", 2023, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
saveRDS(summer_2023_data, here("data_clean", filename))
cat("✓ Summer 2023 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(summer_2023_data), "\n\n")

# Autumn 2023 (September 1 - November 30)
autumn_2023_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
  start_date = "2023-09-01",
  end_date = "2023-11-30",
  gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
  leadtime = leadtime_hours,
  n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
)
filename <- get_filename("autumn", 2023, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
saveRDS(autumn_2023_data, here("data_clean", filename))
cat("✓ Autumn 2023 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(autumn_2023_data), "\n\n")

# Winter 2023-2024 (December 1, 2023 - February 29, 2024) 
# Note: 2024 is a leap year
winter_2023_data <- collect_data_range_optimized(
  start_date = "2023-12-01",
  end_date = "2023-12-31",
  gridpoint_id = gridpoint_id,
  leadtime = leadtime_hours,
  n_wow_stations = n_wow_stations
)
filename <- get_filename("winter", 2023, gridpoint_id, leadtime_hours)
saveRDS(winter_2023_data, here("data_clean", filename))
cat("✓ Winter 2023-24 saved:", filename, "| Rows:", nrow(winter_2023_data), "\n\n")

```
